description: Flex item leftovers: order (visual reordering), flex-shrink (0 pins an item, others absorb overflow), align-self (per-item cross-axis override), flex-wrap: wrap-reverse (lines stack bottom-to-top), and align-content (cross-axis line distribution in a tall container).
visual_assertions: The order row reads Bravo, Charlie, Alpha left to right (source order Alpha, Bravo, Charlie overridden by order 3/1/2).
In the flex-shrink row, Keep holds its 200pt basis while Squeeze shrinks to absorb all the overflow.
In the align-self row, Tall sits at the top, Center is vertically centered, and End is bottom-aligned.
wrap-reverse stacks the two flex lines bottom-to-top: Wthree's line sits above the Wone/Wtwo line.
align-content: center vertically centers the two wrapped lines inside the 150pt-tall container.
